productDisplayName: Fila Unisex Glory Olive Lemon Yellow Floater
description: Get ready to float in comfort with these Glory floaters from fila. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail. Upper Synthetic upper with forefoot straps and one ankle strap, coupled with velcro fasteners for easy adjustment to attain a snug Fit Straps with textile lining for extra durability and comfort Collar strap with cushioned pad to prevent chafing Cushioned inners for greater comfort Embossed logo on the side of the ankle strap for style Midsole Cushioned footbed with textured pattern for a massaged feel all day Outsole TPR outsole with multi-directional pattern for greater grip and traction Impact guidance system to absorb shock on impact and distribute it along the sole Flex grooves for natural movement of the feet Lugs to provide greater durability and stability shoe careWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
